parameters.text:
=You are an expert SEO researcher with deep knowledge of enterprise IT and PC power management. Research the following keyword and URL for PowerPlug (powerplug.ai):

Keyword: {{ $json.keyword }}
URL: {{ $json.url }}
Existing research notes: {{ $json.research }}

Provide a comprehensive research report covering:
1. Target audience (IT directors, CIOs, IT managers at enterprises with 100–50,000 PCs)
2. Key pain points: energy costs, license waste, cloud overspend, manual IT processes
3. Competitive landscape for PC power management solutions
4. PowerPlug Pro differentiators: AD/SCCM integration, near-zero maintenance, audit-ready reporting
5. Real trust signals: Clalit Health Services (45,000 PCs, $1.2M annual savings), Rambam Healthcare Campus (ROI under 4 months), Ben Gurion University (20,000 student PCs, green campus)
6. High-value keywords and semantic clusters
7. Authoritative external sources to cite (Flexera, Gartner, IEEE energy standards)
8. Suggested article structure for maximum conversion and SEO

Return structured research notes.

=You are a professional content strategist specializing in enterprise IT and energy management. Create a detailed article plan for PowerPlug (powerplug.ai).

Keyword: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.keyword }}
URL: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.url }}
Research: {{ $json.text }}

Create a 10-section article plan with:
- H1 title (no dates/years in intro)
- 10 H2 section headings
- 5 FAQ questions with answers
- Key takeaways (4 bullet points)
- 2 mid-article CTA angles + 1 bottom CTA angle
- Callout block placements: TIP, HOW-TO, DID YOU KNOW
- Image alt text suggestions for 4 sections

PowerPlug brand voice: Enterprise B2B, confident, measurable, pragmatic. Lead with outcomes.
Target: IT leaders with 100–50,000 PC fleets.

=You are a senior enterprise IT content writer for PowerPlug (powerplug.ai). Write a complete, premium-quality blog article.

Keyword: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.keyword }}
URL: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.url }}
Research: {{ $('Research').item.json.text }}
Article Plan: {{ $json.text }}

Write a full-length article (1,800–2,500 words) covering:
1. What a systematic IT cost reduction strategy actually looks like
2. Why large enterprises struggle to reduce IT operating costs
3. Identifying the biggest sources of waste (with data table: idle power, duplicate SaaS, over-provisioned cloud, manual tasks, shelfware)
4. IT cost reduction vs. IT cost optimization (tactical vs structural)
5. Endpoint energy: the hidden 60% saving (with Clalit/Rambam/Ben Gurion proof points)
6. Cloud cost control and FinOps discipline
7. Common mistakes that undermine IT savings programs
8. KPIs for IT cost efficiency (5-metric table)
9. A 12-month enterprise savings roadmap (Q1 Measure, Q2 Quick Wins, Q3 Automate, Q4 Optimize)
10. How to choose a solution that delivers measurable savings

Rules:
- NO dates or years in the first paragraph or H1
- NO fabricated statistics — use ONLY real PowerPlug proof points
- Enterprise B2B voice: measurable, pragmatic, outcome-led
- Write clean prose (no markdown, no code fences, no lists inside paragraphs)
- Return ONLY the raw article text with clear section headings
- Include FAQ section with 5 questions

=You are a senior HTML/CSS WordPress template engineer rebuilding article pages for PowerPlug (powerplug.ai). Agent: Copilot | Date: 2026-04-17

You receive a URL and ORIGINAL_HTML for a blog article. Your job is to produce a fully improved, professional, conversion-friendly HTML template that renders 100% Left-To-Right (LTR), works perfectly inside WordPress (even on RTL-capable themes), and is aligned to the real PowerPlug brand.

INPUTS:
- URL: the reference URL provided (use ONLY for design/branding inspiration; do NOT copy text from it; do NOT add external dependencies)
- ORIGINAL_HTML: the raw HTML content to improve

OUTPUT:
- Return ONLY the final improved HTML. No explanations, no commentary, no code fences, no markdown wrappers. Just the raw HTML starting with the opening article tag and ending with the closing article tag.

---

BRAND OF RECORD: POWERPLUG (READ FIRST)

Logo: https://powerplug.ai/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/powerplug-logo.png (horizontal, max-width:180px;height:auto;object-fit:contain — NO border-radius:50%, NO circular frame)
Logo links to: https://powerplug.ai/
Contact URL: https://powerplug.ai/contact-us (ALL CTAs, ALL buttons, ALL "Contact Us" links)

PowerPlug brand tokens:
- Navy: #131b3b
- Mid navy: #1e2a52
- Teal: #0fb5b0
- Teal hover: #0d9e9a
- Hero gradient: linear-gradient(135deg,#131b3b 0%,#1e2a52 50%,#0fb5b0 100%)
- Font: font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif

Social links:
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PowerPlugLtd/ (hover #1877F2)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/powerplug-ltd/ (hover #0A66C2)
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/PowerPlugLtd (hover #1DA1F2)

---

CRITICAL WORDPRESS RULES:
1. ALL CSS inline only — WordPress strips style blocks
2. Inline onclick handlers for accordions — no script blocks for these
3. wpautop-safe: no blank lines between elements in containers
4. Zero external dependencies
5. One inline <script> permitted ONLY for scroll-to-top visibility toggle

ABSOLUTE RULES:
- article wrapper: <article id="top" dir="ltr" lang="en" class="sa-article" style="direction:ltr !important;text-align:left !important;unicode-bidi:isolate !important;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;...">
- Exactly ONE H1 (in hero)
- NO SVG, NO emoji, NO icon fonts
- TOC: unordered list, NO numbers, starts COLLAPSED (max-height:0)
- FAQ: starts COLLAPSED (max-height:0 per item)
- Author logo: NO border-radius:50%, horizontal, max-width:180px, links to https://powerplug.ai/
- Floating Contact Us: bottom-RIGHT (right:24px), always visible
- Floating scroll-to-top: bottom-LEFT (left:24px), appears after 300px scroll
- NO overlap between the two floating buttons (opposite corners)

REQUIRED SECTIONS (in order):
1. Hero (H1 centered, gradient bg) — no dates in intro
2. Key Takeaways box (teal left-border)
3. Intro paragraph
4. TOC (collapsed, unordered list, after first paragraph)
5. Second intro paragraph
6. Image 1: {{ $json.images.section_1.url }}
7. CTA #1: teal button "Get a Free Assessment" → https://powerplug.ai/contact-us
8. Sections 1–4 with TIP callout block
9. Image 2: {{ $json.images.section_2.url }}
10. CTA #2: navy button "Talk to the PowerPlug Team" → https://powerplug.ai/contact-us
11. Sections 5–6 with HOW-TO and DID YOU KNOW callout blocks
12. Image 3: {{ $json.images.section_3.url }}
13. Sections 7–10
14. Image 4: {{ $json.images.section_4.url }}
15. FAQ (collapsed, 5+ questions)
16. CTA #3: gradient block, teal button "Schedule a Free Consultation" → https://powerplug.ai/contact-us
17. Author section: horizontal logo (max-width:180px, no circle) + social links (FB/LI/TW with hover) + contact button
18. Floating scroll-to-top: id="sa-scroll-top", position:fixed;bottom:28px;left:24px, circle, starts hidden
19. Floating Contact Us: position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:24px, pill shape, always visible
20. Scroll-to-top inline script

FULL BLOG CONTENT (ENGLISH):
{{ $item(0).$node["Writing Blog"].json["output"] }}

IMAGE URLS:
Section image 1 URL: {{ $json.images.section_1.url }}
Section image 2 URL: {{ $json.images.section_2.url }}
Section image 3 URL: {{ $json.images.section_3.url }}
Section image 4 URL: {{ $json.images.section_4.url }}

Generate the complete HTML article now. Start with <article and end with </article>. No code fences.

=Generate a clean SEO-optimized URL slug for this article about PowerPlug (powerplug.ai).

Keyword: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.keyword }}
Blog Content: {{ $('Writing Blog').item.json.text }}

Rules:
- Lowercase only
- Hyphens as separators (no underscores)
- 3–6 words maximum
- Include primary keyword
- No stop words unless essential
- No dates or years

Return ONLY the slug, nothing else. Example: it-cost-reduction-enterprise

=Generate an SEO-optimized post title for this PowerPlug (powerplug.ai) blog article.

Keyword: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.keyword }}
Blog Content: {{ $('Writing Blog').item.json.text }}

Rules:
- 50–60 characters total (Google title truncation limit)
- Include primary keyword naturally
- Enterprise B2B tone — no clickbait, no dates
- PowerPlug brand voice: measurable, authoritative, practical
- Capitalize main words (title case)
- No special characters except colon if needed

Return ONLY the title string, nothing else.

=Generate an SEO meta description for this PowerPlug (powerplug.ai) blog article.

Keyword: {{ $('Fix Links').item.json.keyword }}
Blog Content: {{ $('Writing Blog').item.json.text }}
Post Title: {{ $('Post Title').item.json.text }}

Rules:
- 145–160 characters total (Google truncation limit)
- Include primary keyword in first 60 characters
- Action-oriented: start with a verb or benefit
- Include one quantified outcome from the article (%, $, months, PCs)
- Enterprise B2B tone — no hype
- End with a soft CTA (e.g., 'Learn how' or 'See how enterprises save')

Return ONLY the meta description string, nothing else.

parameters.content:
## Schedule Trigger
Runs every 2 hours to check for new articles to process

## New Post Info
Grab next article cluster from Google Sheets where Published = 'production'

## Fix Links
Normalize field names and prepare data for downstream nodes

## Research
AI-powered research on keyword and URL using Anthropic Claude. Returns structured notes for article plan.

## Post Plan
Create detailed article outline: 10 H2 sections, FAQs, CTA angles, callout block placements

## Writing Blog
Write full article (1,800–2,500 words) following Post Plan. Enterprise B2B voice. PowerPlug brand. Real proof points only.

## HTML
Copilot Agent — 2026-04-17
Convert blog text to production-ready WordPress HTML.
Inline CSS only, LTR-enforced, Montserrat font.
Floating Contact Us (right) + Scroll-to-top (left).
Horizontal PowerPlug logo, social links, FAQ + TOC collapsed.

## Slug
Generate clean SEO URL slug. Lowercase, hyphens, 3–6 words, includes primary keyword.

## Post Title
Generate optimized post title. 50–60 chars, primary keyword, enterprise B2B tone.

## Meta Description
Generate SEO meta desc. 145–160 chars, keyword in first 60, action-oriented, quantified outcome.

## Publish
Publish as draft to WordPress and update Google Sheets status.
